advice.title: You never committed during this session
advice.body: You went 4 checkpoints with no commit. Commits are cheap restore points; without them you can't bisect, can't revert cleanly, and your PR diff balloons.

advice.title: Process score fell over the session
advice.body: Your process score fell from 50 to 10 (-40 points). Your end-of-session state is worse than your start — look at the chart for where the drop happened.
